# IPA Sound Drill

> Drill your English sounds with IPA. A free, open, browser-based tool for learning English pronunciation using the International Phonetic Alphabet.

IPA Sound Drill helps learners understand sound-to-spelling relationships and rebuild their pronunciation from the sound level. Built on the principle "you can't hear what you can't say," the app is designed for non-native English speakers who want to systematically improve their pronunciation using IPA notation.

## Modes

- **Decode**: See IPA notation (e.g., /kætəˌpɪlər/), type the English word (caterpillar)
- **Encode**: See the English word, transcribe to IPA using an on-screen IPA keyboard
- **Sound → Vocabulary (Mode B)**: Listen to audio and identify the correct word from context, then check meaning and IPA
- **Connected Speech**: Practice linking, weak forms (36 function words), and 201 phrase-level pronunciation patterns
- **Vocabulary Browser**: Search 5,397 CEFR-graded words with GA/RP IPA, respelling, and audio

## Languages

Interface available in 6 languages:

- English (`/en/`)
- Japanese (`/ja/`)
- Korean (`/ko/`)
- Simplified Chinese (`/zh-Hans/`)
- Traditional Chinese (`/zh-Hant/`)
- Filipino (`/fil/`)

## URLs

- Home (auto-detects language): https://ipasounddrill.app/
- English: https://ipasounddrill.app/en/
- Japanese: https://ipasounddrill.app/ja/
- Korean: https://ipasounddrill.app/ko/
- Simplified Chinese: https://ipasounddrill.app/zh-Hans/
- Traditional Chinese: https://ipasounddrill.app/zh-Hant/
- Filipino: https://ipasounddrill.app/fil/
- Sitemap: https://ipasounddrill.app/sitemap.xml

## Data

- Wordlist: 5,397 CEFR-graded English words with both General American (GA) and Received Pronunciation (RP) IPA
- Connected speech phrases: 201 (with CEFR badges)
- Weak forms: 36 function words
- Multilingual phoneme explanations: 6 languages

## Technology

Static HTML + vanilla JS + JSON data + Google Apps Script (TTS proxy). Hosted on Vercel.

## Source

GitHub: https://github.com/nkhippo/IPASoundDrill
License: See repository (Track A period, TBD for public license)
